description:
Model a shed-roof building and install a solar array consisting of EXACTLY 10 panels arranged in a 2-row by 5-column grid, centered on the roof.

Instructions:
1. Set SketchUp units to Decimal Feet.
2. Draw a rectangular footprint: 24 feet (red axis) by 16 feet (green axis).
3. Create a shed (mono-pitch) roof sloping down to the South. The North wall should be 14 feet high, and the South wall 10 feet high.
4. Open Skelion, set panel orientation to Portrait, and Tilt to 0 (Flush with roof).
5. Install the panels on the south-facing slope.
6. Adjust or prune the layout so there are EXACTLY 10 panels in a contiguous 2x5 block (2 rows, 5 columns).
7. Ensure the array is centered on the roof.
8. Save the completed model to: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fixed_count_layout.skp
